examples: She ran out of the room in tears.
He ran out to catch the bus.
Don't run out without your coat.
The contract runs out next month.
The children ran out to play.
They ran out of milk this morning.
They ran out when they heard the alarm.
Don't let the gas run out.
example_translate: Она выбежала из комнаты в слезах.
У них закончилось молоко этим утром.
run out.synonyms:
Заканчиваться (о запасах, времени) - be exhausted, be depleted
Выбегать (из помещения) - exit quickly, rush out
